title: Fact Sheet: President Donald J. Trump Announces â€œFair and Reciprocal Planâ€ on Trade
content: President Donald Trump has directed his administration to explore potential retaliation against Brazilâ€™s ethanol trade policies, which impose an 18% tariff on U.S. ethanol exports, compared to the U.S. tariff of just 2.5%. In 2024, this disparity led to the U.S. importing over $200 million in ethanol from Brazil, while only exporting $52 million to Brazil.
author: Analysts Account
